Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer

Arista 7250X

The Arista 7250X uses four Broadcom Trident II (BCM56850) ASICs connected via a crossbar.

Field Value
Ports 64 QSFP
RX Queues 8Q
Total Buffer 12 MB/ASIC, 48 MB total
TX Buffer (max to 1 port) Dynamic up to 8 MB

Each chip manages its own 12 MB memory pool. Memory from one ASIC cannot be shared with ports on another ASIC.

References

  • Arista 7250X Datasheet

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
